candidate_llm_application: LLM context-budget allocation across attention heads as DGLAP-style scale-dependent partitioning: each head's effective compute budget evolves with input length, summing to total layer budget=1.

results.title: Sparse-Attention Block Routing: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on sparse-attention block routing, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
